Kitchen & Tap List

Our Menus

Fresh food from our in-house kitchen paired with handcrafted beers. Available Wednesday through Sunday.

🕐

Kitchen Hours: Wed 4–8pm · Thu 3–8pm · Fri 3–8pm · Sat 12–8pm · Sun 1–5pm
Hours are approximate — kitchen may close when food sells out. Call ahead: 315-381-3459

Food
Kitchen Menu

Fresh, hearty food made to pair with great craft beer.

Menu items rotate seasonally. Ask your server or call us for the current offerings.

Drinks
On Tap

Our beers rotate regularly. Below are some of the styles you'll find on tap.

Craft Beer
What's on Tap

Tap list rotates — follow us on Facebook or call ahead for the current lineup.

Lager

Hamlet Light

Crisp, clean, and easy-drinking. Perfect for a warm afternoon on the patio.

IPA

Westmoreland IPA

Bold hoppy character with citrus and pine notes. A local favorite.

Stout

Seymour Dark

Rich and roasty with notes of coffee and chocolate. Named for Seymour Lane.

Seasonal

Rotating Seasonal

A new seasonal craft every few months — always something to look forward to.

🚚

"Come and Get It" Food Truck

In addition to our kitchen, the "Come and Get It" food truck makes regular appearances at 7 Hamlets, bringing even more delicious options. Check their Facebook page or ours for the schedule.

Food Truck on Facebook →
